What are the different states in the bug:
SELECT [State], COUNT(*) AS StateCount 
FROM [dbo].[Azure devOps] 
WHERE [WorkItemType] = 'Bug' 
GROUP BY [State]
Show me the count of items by State:
SELECT [State], COUNT(*) AS Count 
FROM [dbo].[Azure devOps] 
GROUP BY [State]
top 5 records with maximum days to resol:
SELECT TOP 5 
    [Id], 
    [Title], 
    [WorkItemType], 
    [State], 
    [AssignedTo], 
    [Created_Date], 
    [Changed_Date], 
    [Severity], 
    [Priority], 
    [Module], 
    [Environment]
FROM 
    [dbo].[Azure devOps]
ORDER BY 
    DATEDIFF(DAY, 
             CASE 
                 WHEN [Changed_Date] = '0000-00-00' THEN GETDATE() 
                 ELSE [Changed_Date] 
             END, 
             CASE 
                 WHEN [Created_Date] = '0000-00-00' THEN GETDATE() 
                 ELSE [Created_Date] 
             END) DESC
keep a simple query to given top 5 recor:
SELECT TOP 5 [Id], 
       DATEDIFF(DAY, [Created_Date], [Changed_Date]) AS DaysToResolve
FROM [dbo].[Azure devOps]
ORDER BY DATEDIFF(DAY, [Created_Date], [Changed_Date]) DESC
What is the count of tickets per Module:
SELECT Module, COUNT(*) AS CountOfTickets 
FROM dbo.[Azure devOps] 
WHERE State = 'Closed' 
GROUP BY Module

SELECT 
    Module, 
    COUNT(*) AS TotalTickets, 
    CONVERT(DECIMAL(10, 2), COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.[Azure devOps])) AS Percentage
FROM 
    dbo.[Azure devOps]
WHERE 
    State = 'Closed'
GROUP BY 
    Module
ORDER BY 
    TotalTickets DESC
What is the count of tickets per environ:
SELECT 
    Environment, 
    COUNT(*) AS TotalTickets, 
    CONVERT(DECIMAL(10, 2), COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.[Azure devOps])) AS Percentage
FROM 
    dbo.[Azure devOps]
WHERE 
    State = 'Closed'
GROUP BY 
    Environment
ORDER BY 
    TotalTickets DESC
What is the count of tickets per State:
SELECT 
    State, 
    COUNT(*) AS TotalCount, 
    CONVERT(DECIMAL(10, 2), COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.[Azure devOps])) AS Percentage
FROM 
    dbo.[Azure devOps]
GROUP BY 
    State
ORDER BY 
    TotalCount DESC;
What is the count of tickets per Priorit:
SELECT 
    Priority, 
    COUNT(*) AS TotalTickets, 
    CONVERT(DECIMAL(10, 2), COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.[Azure devOps])) AS Percentage
FROM 
    dbo.[Azure devOps]
GROUP BY 
    Priority
ORDER BY 
    TotalTickets DESC;

SELECT 
    Priority,
    COUNT(*) AS TotalTickets,
    CONVERT(DECIMAL(10, 2), COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.[Azure devOps])) AS Percentage
FROM 
    dbo.[Azure devOps]
GROUP BY 
    Priority
ORDER BY 
    TotalTickets DESC;
How many bugs were created monthly? orde:
SELECT 
    YEAR(Created_Date) AS Year, 
    MONTH(Created_Date) AS Month, 
    COUNT(Id) AS BugCount
FROM 
    dbo.[Azure devOps]
GROUP BY 
    YEAR(Created_Date), 
    MONTH(Created_Date)
ORDER BY 
    Year, 
    Month
How many bugs were created yearly?:
SELECT 
    YEAR(Created_Date) AS Year, 
    COUNT(Id) AS BugCount
FROM 
    dbo.[Azure devOps]
GROUP BY 
    YEAR(Created_Date)
How many bugs were closed this month vs:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN DATEDIFF(month, ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE()), GETDATE()) = 0 THEN 'This Month'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(month, ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE()), DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE())) = 1 THEN 'Last Month'
    END AS [Month],
    COUNT(*) AS [Number of Bugs]
FROM 
    dbo.[Azure devOps]
WHERE 
    State = 'Closed'
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN DATEDIFF(month, ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE()), GETDATE()) = 0 THEN 'This Month'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(month, ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE()), DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE())) = 1 THEN 'Last Month'
    END
n:
SELECT 
    Id, 
    Title, 
    State, 
    AssignedTo, 
    ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE()) AS Completed_Date, 
    DATEDIFF(day, Created_Date, ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE())) AS Duration_Days, 
    Severity, 
    Priority, 
    Module, 
    Environment, 
    DATEDIFF(month, Created_Date, ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE())) AS Duration_Months
FROM 
    dbo.[Azure devOps]
WHERE 
    DATEDIFF(month, Created_Date, ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE())) IN (0, 1)
How many high-priority bugs are currentl:
SELECT COUNT(Id) 
FROM dbo.[Azure devOps] 
WHERE State = 'Open' AND Priority = 1
How many bugs are currently not closed?:
SELECT COUNT(Id) 
FROM dbo.[Azure devOps] 
WHERE State <> 'Closed'
What are the oldest bug which is not clo:
SELECT TOP 1 
    [Id], 
    [State], 
    [Created_Date]
FROM 
    dbo.[Azure devOps]
WHERE 
    [State] <> 'Closed' 
ORDER BY 
    [Created_Date] ASC
Bugs open for more than 30 days? group b:
SELECT 
    Severity, 
    COUNT(*) AS OpenBugsCount, 
    MAX(Created_Date) AS OldestBugDate, 
    MIN(ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE())) AS NewestBugDate
FROM 
    dbo.azure_devops_bugs
WHERE 
    DATEDIFF(day, Created_Date, ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE())) > 30
GROUP BY 
    Severity

SELECT 
    Priority, 
    COUNT(*) AS OpenBugsCount, 
    MAX(Created_Date) AS OldestBugDate, 
    MIN(ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE())) AS NewestBugDate
FROM 
    dbo.azure_devops_bugs
WHERE 
    DATEDIFF(day, Created_Date, ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE())) > 30
GROUP BY 
    Priority
Resolution time by severity:
SELECT 
    Severity, 
    AVG(DATEDIFF(day, Created_Date, ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE()))) AS AverageResolutionTime
FROM 
    dbo.azure_devops_bugs
GROUP BY 
    Severity
Resolution time by module:
SELECT 
    Module, 
    AVG(DATEDIFF(day, Created_Date, ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE()))) AS AverageResolutionTime
FROM 
    dbo.azure_devops_bugs
GROUP BY 
    Module
Assignees with slowest closure rate:
SELECT 
    AssignedTo, 
    AVG(DATEDIFF(day, Created_Date, ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE()))) AS AverageClosureDays
FROM 
    dbo.azure_devops_bugs
WHERE 
    State = 'Closed'
GROUP BY 
    AssignedTo
ORDER BY 
    AverageClosureDays DESC;
Workload distribution across team:
SELECT 
    AssignedTo, 
    COUNT(Id) AS TotalBugs, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN State = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ClosedBugs, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN State != 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OpenBugs
FROM 
    dbo.azure_devops_bugs
GROUP BY 
    AssignedTo
Workload distribution across team sort i:
SELECT 
    AssignedTo, 
    COUNT(*) AS TotalTickets, 
    CONVERT(DECIMAL(10, 2), COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.azure_devops_bugs)) AS Percentage
FROM 
    dbo.azure_devops_bugs
GROUP BY 
    AssignedTo
ORDER BY 
    TotalTickets DESC;
Bugs by environment sort in desc, and %f:
SELECT 
    Environment, 
    COUNT(*) AS TotalBugs, 
    CONVERT(DECIMAL(10, 2), COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.azure_devops_bugs)) AS Percentage
FROM 
    dbo.azure_devops_bugs
GROUP BY 
    Environment
ORDER BY 
    TotalBugs DESC;
Top 5 assignees by bugs closed last mont:
SELECT TOP 5 
    AssignedTo, 
    COUNT(Id) AS BugCount
FROM 
    dbo.azure_devops_bugs
WHERE 
    State = 'Closed' 
    AND DATEDIFF(month, ISNULL(Changed_Date, GETDATE()), GETDATE()) = 1
GROUP BY 
    AssignedTo
ORDER BY 
    BugCount DESC;
What is number of bugs in security?:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS NumberOfBugs 
FROM dbo.azure_devops_bugs 
WHERE Environment = 'Security'
